name: Sam Liccardo
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $333,790 for Sam Liccardo in U.S. House, CA-16. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
